response:
Emily gathered twenty-four blue fruits while David picked fifteen additional ones to reach thirty-nine total berries in his basket.

***

Sophia harvested twelve since David collected triple that amount which matches the sum of his own gathering.

***

The group combined all sixty-six berries to bake seven full batches of muffins because each set needed nine fruits.

***

Selling every batch for five dollars earned them thirty-five coins for their hard work today among youth
